title: UK pauses Chagos handover deal after Trump criticism
summary_full: Britain has shelved plans to return the Chagos Islands to Mauritius following strong criticism from US President Trump. The deal, which included leasing Diego Garcia for a century, will not proceed without US support. A former top official indicated the UK government was forced to abandon the plan due to Trump's opposition.
